case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY MERINO BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY MERINO BAIL BONDS $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2000, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION FILED.
